texto: He was not thinking that the Christian law which he had wanted to follow all his life prescribed that he forgive and love his enemies
autor: but the joyful feeling of love and forgiveness of his enemies filled his soul.
explicacao: Citação de but the joyful feeling of love and forgiveness of his enemies filled his soul. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “He was not thinking that the Christian law which he had wanted to follow all his life prescribed …” articula reflexao, leo-tolstoy, anna-karenina em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como anna-karenina.
